OP12-001.name: Silvers Rayleigh
OP12-001.effect: Under the rules of this game, you cannot include cards with a cost of 5 or more in your deck.

OP12-003.name: Crocus
OP12-003.effect: [On K.O.] You may reveal 2 Events from your hand: Play up to 1 red Character card with 3000 power or less from your hand.

OP12-004.name: Kouzuki Oden
OP12-004.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may reveal 2 Events from your hand: This Character gains +2000 power during this turn.

OP12-006.name: Shakuyaku
OP12-006.effect: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Monkey.D.Luffy] or 1 red Event and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-007.name: Shanks
OP12-007.effect: [On Play] Up to 1 of your Characters with a type including "Roger Pirates" other than [Shanks] gains [Rush] during this turn.

OP12-009.name: Jinbe
OP12-009.effect: [On Play] You may reveal 2 Events from your hand: This Character gains [Rush] during this turn. Then, this Character gains +1000 power until the end of your opponent's next End Phase.

OP12-012.name: Buggy
OP12-012.effect: [On Play] Up to 1 of your Characters with a type including "Roger Pirates" other than [Buggy] gains [Blocker] until the end of your opponent's next End Phase.

OP12-013.name: Hatchan
OP12-013.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character and reveal 2 Events from your hand: Give up to 2 rested DON!! cards to your Leader or 1 of your Characters.

OP12-014.name: Boa Hancock
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
OP12-014.effect: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Monkey.D.Luffy] or red Event and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-015.name: Monkey.D.Luffy
OP12-015.effect: If you have a total of 2 or more given DON!! cards, this Character gains +2000 power.

OP12-016.name: To Never Doubt--That Is Power!
OP12-016.effect: [Main] You may give 2 active DON!! cards to 1 of your [Silvers Rayleigh]: Your opponent cannot activate [Blocker] when the card given these DON!! cards attacks during this turn.

OP12-017.name: Color of Observation Haki
OP12-017.effect: [Main] You may give 1 active DON!! card to 1 of your [Silvers Rayleigh]: Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 red Event or up to 1 Character card with a cost of 3 or more and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-018.name: Color of the Supreme King Haki
OP12-018.effect: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Characters or [Silvers Rayleigh] gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, you may rest 1 of your DON!! cards. If you do, give your opponent's Leader and all of their Characters −1000 power during this turn.

OP12-019.name: Color of Arms Haki
OP12-019.effect: [Main] You may give 1 active DON!! card to 1 of your [Silvers Rayleigh]: Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +1000 power during this turn.

OP12-020.name: Roronoa Zoro
OP12-020.effect: [DON!! x3] [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] If this Leader battles your opponent's Character during this turn, set this Leader as active. Then, this Leader cannot attack your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 7 or less during this turn.

OP12-021.name: Ipponmatsu
OP12-021.effect: If your Leader has the <Slash> attribute and you have 6 or more rested DON!! cards, this Character cannot be rested by your opponent's effects.

OP12-022.name: Inuarashi
OP12-022.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a cost of 5 or less will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase.

OP12-024.name: Gyukimaru
OP12-024.effect: If this Character is active, this Character cannot be K.O.'d by your opponent's effects.

OP12-026.name: Kuina
OP12-026.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 4 or less. Then, give up to 3 rested DON!! cards to your [Roronoa Zoro] Leader.

OP12-027.name: Koushirou
OP12-027.effect: If your <Slash> attribute Character with a cost of 5 or less other than this Character would be K.O.'d by your opponent's effect, you may rest this Character instead.

OP12-028.name: Kouzuki Hiyori
OP12-028.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest 1 of your DON!! cards and this Character: If your Leader is [Roronoa Zoro], look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 <Slash> attribute card or green Event and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-029.name: Shimotsuki Kouzaburou
OP12-029.effect: [On Play] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 2 or less. Then, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's rested Characters with a base cost of 1 or less.

OP12-030.name: Dracule Mihawk
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea

OP12-031.name: Tashigi
OP12-031.effect: [On Play] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 6 or less. Then, give up to 3 rested DON!! cards to your [Roronoa Zoro] Leader.

OP12-033.name: Helmeppo
OP12-033.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

OP12-034.name: Perona
OP12-034.effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the <Slash> attribute, look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 <Slash> attribute card or green Event and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-036.name: Roronoa Zoro
OP12-036.effect: This card in your hand cannot be played by effects.

OP12-037.name: Demon Aura Nine Sword Style Asura Blades Drawn Dead Man's Game
OP12-037.effect: [Main] You may rest 3 of your DON!! cards: Rest up to a total of 2 of your opponent's Characters or DON!! cards.

OP12-038.name: Two-Sword Style Rashomon
OP12-038.effect: [Main] You may rest 2 of your DON!! cards: K.O. up to 2 of your opponent's rested Characters with a base cost of 4 or less.

OP12-039.name: Luffy Is the Man Who Will Become the King of Pirates!!!
OP12-039.effect: [Main] Set your [Roronoa Zoro] Leader as active.

OP12-040.name: Kuzan
OP12-040.effect: When a card is trashed from your hand by your {Navy} type card's effect, draw cards equal to the number of cards trashed.

OP12-041.name: Sanji
OP12-041.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] DON!! −1: Activate up to 1 {Straw Hat Crew} type Event with a base cost of 3 or less from your hand.

OP12-042.name: Alvida
OP12-042.effect: If you have 2 or more Characters with a base cost of 5 or more, this Character gains +1 cost.

OP12-043.name: Kuzan
OP12-043.effect: If you have 5 or more cards in your hand, this Character gains +1 cost.

OP12-044.name: Sakazuki
OP12-044.effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Navy} type, draw 2 cards.

OP12-046.name: Zephyr(Navy)
OP12-046.effect: [On Play] Trash 2 cards from your hand.

OP12-047.name: Sengoku
OP12-047.effect: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 2 {Navy} type cards other than [Sengoku] and add them to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-048.name: Donquixote Rosinante
OP12-048.effect: [Opponent's Turn] If your blue {Navy} type Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may rest this Character and trash 1 card from your hand instead.

OP12-050.name: Jaguar.D.Saul
OP12-050.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

OP12-051.name: Hina
OP12-051.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character and trash 1 card from your hand: Up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 4 or less cannot activate [Blocker] during this turn.

OP12-053.name: Borsalino
OP12-053.effect: [Once Per Turn] If this Character would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may trash 1 card from your hand instead.

OP12-054.name: Marshall.D.Teach
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
OP12-054.effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the {The Seven Warlords of the Sea} type, return up to 1 Character with a cost of 1 or less other than this Character to the owner's hand.

OP12-056.name: Monkey.D.Garp
OP12-056.effect: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Play up to 1 blue {Navy} type Character card with 8000 power or less other than [Monkey.D.Garp] from your hand.

OP12-057.name: Ice Block Pheasant Peck
OP12-057.effect: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +4000 power during this battle. Then, trash 1 card from your hand.

OP12-058.name: I Will Make Whitebeard the King of the Pirates
OP12-058.effect: [Main] If your Leader's type includes "Whitebeard Pirates", reveal 1 card from the top of your deck. If that card is a Character card with a type including "Whitebeard Pirates" and a cost of 9 or less, you may play that card. If you do, that Character gains [Rush] during this turn.

OP12-059.name: Concasser
OP12-059.effect: [Main] If your Leader is [Sanji], draw 1 card.

OP12-060.name: Boeuf Burst
OP12-060.effect: [Main] If your Leader is multicolored, choose one:

OP12-061.name: Donquixote Rosinante
OP12-061.effect: [Once Per Turn] If your [Trafalgar Law] would be K.O.'d, you may add 1 card from the top of your Life cards to your hand instead.

OP12-062.name: Vinsmoke Sora
OP12-062.effect: [On Play] If your Leader is [Sanji] and the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and rest it. Then, draw 1 card.

OP12-063.name: Vinsmoke Reiju
OP12-063.effect: If you have 4 or more Events in your trash, this Character gains +2000 power and +5 cost.

OP12-065.name: Emporio.Ivankov
OP12-065.effect: If you have 4 or more Events in your trash, this Character gains [Blocker].

OP12-066.name: Carne
OP12-066.effect: If you have 4 or more Events in your trash, this Character gains [Blocker].

OP12-069.name: Crocodile
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
OP12-069.effect: [On Your Opponent's Attack] [Once Per Turn] DON!! −1: If your Leader's type includes "Baroque Works", up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle.

OP12-070.name: Sanji
OP12-070.effect: This Character gains +1000 power for every 5 Events in your trash.

OP12-071.name: Charlotte Pudding
OP12-071.effect: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Sanji] or Event card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-072.name: Zeff
OP12-072.effect: When a DON!! card on your field is returned to your DON!! deck, if your Leader is [Sanji], this Character gains [Rush] during this turn.

OP12-073.name: Trafalgar Law
OP12-073.effect: [On Play] If the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field, add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active. Then, all of your [Donquixote Rosinante] and {Heart Pirates} type Characters gain +1000 power until the end of your opponent's next End Phase.

OP12-074.name: Patty
OP12-074.effect: [On Play] You may trash 1 Event from your hand: If your Leader is [Sanji], add up to 1 DON!! card from your DON!! deck and set it as active.

OP12-075.name: Ms. All Sunday
OP12-075.effect: [On Play] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 3 or less. Then, your opponent may add 1 DON!! card from their DON!! deck and set it as active.

OP12-077.name: The "Extinguishes All Sound Created by Your Influence" Technique
OP12-077.effect: [Main] Select up to 1 of your [Trafalgar Law] cards and that card gains +2000 power during this turn. Then, if the selected card attacks during this turn, your opponent cannot activate [Blocker].

OP12-078.name: Brochette Blow
OP12-078.effect: [Main] If the number of DON!! cards on your field is equal to or less than the number on your opponent's field, draw 1 card. Then, give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −3000 power during this turn.

OP12-079.name: Luffy Is the Man Who Will Be King of the Pirates!!!
OP12-079.effect: [Main] If your Leader is [Sanji], look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and add up to 1 card to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-080.name: Baratie
OP12-080.effect: [Activate: Main] You may place this Stage at the bottom of the owner's deck: If your Leader is [Sanji], look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 Event and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-081.name: Koala
OP12-081.effect: When this Leader attacks your opponent's Leader, if you have 2 or more Characters with a cost of 8 or more, draw 1 card.

OP12-084.name: Emporio.Ivankov
OP12-084.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

OP12-085.name: Karasu
OP12-085.effect: If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, this Character gains +3 cost.

OP12-086.name: Koala
OP12-086.effect: [On Play] If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Revolutionary Army} type card other than [Koala] or up to 1 [Nico Robin] and add it to your hand. Then, trash the rest.

OP12-087.name: Nico Robin
OP12-087.effect: If your Leader is [Koala] or [Monkey.D.Luffy], this Character gains [Blocker] and +3 cost.

OP12-089.name: Hack
OP12-089.effect: If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, this Character gains [Blocker] and +4 cost.

OP12-090.name: Belo Betty
OP12-090.effect: [When Attacking] You may trash 2 cards from the top of your deck: Give up to 1 of your opponent's Characters −2 cost during this turn.

OP12-091.name: Poker
OP12-091.effect: [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may place 3 cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck in any order: Up to 2 of your {SMILE} type Characters gain +2000 power during this turn.

OP12-093.name: Morley
OP12-093.effect: If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, this Character gains +4 cost.

OP12-094.name: Monkey.D.Dragon
OP12-094.effect: [On Play] You may place 3 {Revolutionary Army} type cards from your trash at the bottom of your deck in any order: If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, play up to 1 Character card with a cost of 6 or less from your trash.

OP12-095.name: Lindbergh
OP12-095.effect: If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, this Character gains +4 cost.

OP12-096.name: Ursa Shock
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
OP12-096.effect: [Main] K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less. If you have a Character with a cost of 8 or more, you may select your opponent's Character with a cost of 6 or less instead.

OP12-097.name: Captains Assembled
OP12-097.effect: [Main] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 {Revolutionary Army} type card other than [Captains Assembled] and add it to your hand. Then, trash the rest.

OP12-098.name: Hair Removal Fist
OP12-098.effect: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, if you have a {Revolutionary Army} type Character with a cost of 8 or more, that card gains an additional +2000 power during this battle.

OP12-099.name: Kalgara
OP12-099.effect: [Your Turn] When a card is removed from your or your opponent's Life cards, draw 1 card. Then, you cannot draw cards using your own effects during this turn.

OP12-100.name: Sabo
OP12-100.effect: If you have 3 or less Life cards, this Character gains [Blocker] and +3 cost.

OP12-101.name: Jewelry Bonney
OP12-101.effect: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Your {Supernovas} type Leader gains +1000 power until the end of your opponent's next turn.

OP12-102.name: Shirahoshi
OP12-102.effect: If your Character with a base cost of 6 or less would be removed from the field by your opponent's effect, you may turn 1 card from the top of your Life cards face-up instead.

OP12-105.name: Trafalgar Lammy
OP12-105.effect: [Your Turn] [On Play] Up to 1 of your [Trafalgar Law] cards gains +2000 power during this turn.

OP12-106.name: Trafalgar Law
OP12-106.effect: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)

OP12-107.name: Donquixote Doflamingo
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
OP12-107.effect: If you have 2 or less Life cards, this Character gains [Rush].

OP12-108.name: Donquixote Rosinante
OP12-108.effect: [On Play] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Trafalgar Law] and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-113.name: Roronoa Zoro
OP12-113.effect: [On K.O.] If your Leader has the {Supernovas} type, play up to 1 {Supernovas} type Character card with a cost of 4 or less from your hand rested.

OP12-115.name: I Love You!!
OP12-115.effect: [Counter] Up to 1 of your Leader or Character cards gains +2000 power during this battle. Then, if you have 2 or less Life cards, add up to 1 [Trafalgar Law] from your trash to your hand.

OP12-116.name: We'll Ring the Bell Waiting for You!!
OP12-116.effect: [Main] Look at 5 cards from the top of your deck; reveal a total of up to 2 {Shandian Warrior} type Character cards or [Mont Blanc Noland] and add them to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

OP12-117.name: Slam Gibson
OP12-117.effect: [Main] You may rest 5 of your DON!! cards: If your Leader has the {Supernovas} type, add up to 1 Character with a cost of 9 or less to the top or bottom of the owner's Life cards face-down.

OP12-119.name: Bartholomew Kuma
card_type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
OP12-119.effect: [On Play] You may trash 1 card from your hand: Add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards. Then, this Character gains +2 cost until the end of your opponent's next End Phase.
